description:
Hardware computational performance shown in floating-point operations per second (FLOP/s) per US dollar, adjusted for inflation.FLOP/s values refer to 32-bit (full) precision. Data is expressed in constant 2024 US$. Inflation adjustment is based on the US
Consumer Price Index (CPI).This measures computing power per dollar—specifically, how many calculations per second you get for each inflation-adjusted dollar when buying a GPU.
